title: trifolium badium subsp. badium
intro: Trifolium badium subsp. badium, also known as the white clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium badium subsp. badium include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of white clover can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations and respiratory issues.
